ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the journal */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* Print ISSN of the journal */,
  "issn_online" TEXT /* Online ISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the journal */,
  "subscription_model" TEXT /* Subscription model of the journal (e.g., Hybrid Open Choice) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License type of the journal (e.g., CC BY) */,
  "journal_type" TEXT /* Type of journal (e.g., academic, professional, etc.) */,
  "publication_frequency" TEXT /* Publication frequency of the journal (e.g., monthly, quarterly, etc.) */,
  "impact_factor" TEXT /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "editor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the editor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the editor */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal the editor is associated with */,
  "editor_type" TEXT /* Type of editor (e.g., chief editor, associate editor, etc.) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the editor's term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the editor's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editors_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal the author is associated with */,
  "author_type" TEXT /* Type of author (e.g., primary author, co-author, etc.) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being subscribed to */,
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscriber */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription ends */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive, etc.) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Renewal date of the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_subscriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscriber_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscribers" (
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscriber */,
  "subscriber_name" TEXT /* Full name of the subscriber */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the subscriber */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the subscriber (e.g., individual, institution) */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan chosen by the subscriber (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the subscriber */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the subscriber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscriber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being accessed */,
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscriber accessing the journal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the journal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the journal (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the journal (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the journal was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_subscriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscriber_id") REFERENCES subscribers ("subscriber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of study */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field of study */,
  "field_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each field of study */,
  "field_parent" INTEGER /* Parent field of study (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_fields" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field of study */,
  "primary_field" INTEGER /* Whether the field of study is primary or secondary for the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id", "field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal to which the volume belongs */,
  "volume_number" INTEGER /* Volume number */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_volumes_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal to which the article belongs */,
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volume to which the article belongs */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_articles_volume_id FOREIGN KEY ("volume_id") REFERENCES journal_volumes ("volume_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)
